result.instructions:
TradingView MCP — tools for reading and controlling a live TradingView Desktop chart.

TOOL SELECTION GUIDE:

Reading your chart:
- chart_get_state → get symbol, timeframe, all indicator names + entity IDs (call first)
- data_get_study_values → get current numeric values from ALL visible indicators (RSI, MACD, BB, EMA, etc.)
- data_get_indicator_history → get historical study-model values for loaded chart bars
- data_get_strategy_results / data_get_trades / data_get_orders / data_get_equity → read Strategy Tester report when a strategy is loaded
- quote_get → get real-time price snapshot (last, OHLC, volume)
- data_get_ohlcv → get price bars. ALWAYS pass summary=true unless you need individual bars

Reading custom Pine indicator output (line.new/label.new/table.new/box.new drawings):
- data_get_pine_lines → horizontal price levels from custom indicators (deduplicated, sorted)
- data_get_pine_labels → text annotations with prices ("PDH 24550", "Bias Long", etc.)
- data_get_pine_tables → table data as formatted rows (session stats, analytics dashboards)
- data_get_pine_boxes → price zones as {high, low} pairs
- ALWAYS pass study_filter to target a specific indicator by name

Editing Pine source:
- pine_get_source returns source hash/name/type; pine_set_source creates a backup; pine_restore_source verifies SHA256

Screenshots: capture_screenshot → regions: "full", "chart", "strategy_tester"
Launch: tv_launch → auto-detect and start TradingView with CDP on any platform

CONTEXT MANAGEMENT:
- ALWAYS use summary=true on data_get_ohlcv
- ALWAYS use study_filter on pine tools when you know which indicator you want
- Prefer capture_screenshot for visual context over pulling large datasets
- Call chart_get_state ONCE at start, reuse entity IDs

tools.name: tv_health_check
tools.description: Check CDP connection to TradingView and return current chart state

tools.name: tv_discover
tools.description: Report which known TradingView API paths are available and their methods

tools.name: tv_ui_state
tools.description: Get current UI state: which panels are open, what buttons are visible/enabled/disabled

tools.name: tv_launch
tools.description: Launch TradingView Desktop with Chrome DevTools Protocol (remote debugging) enabled. Auto-detects install location on Mac, Windows, and Linux.

kill_existing.description: Kill existing TradingView instances first (default true)

tv_path.description: Explicit path to TradingView executable (overrides auto-discovery)

tools.name: chart_get_state
tools.description: Get current chart state: symbol, timeframe, chart type, and list of all active indicators with entity IDs

tools.name: chart_get_visible_range
tools.description: Get the currently visible time range and bars range of the chart

tools.name: chart_set_symbol
tools.description: Change the chart symbol and wait for it to reload with new data

tools.name: chart_set_timeframe
tools.description: Change the chart resolution/timeframe (e.g. 1, 5, 15, 60, 240, D, W, M)

tools.name: chart_set_type
tools.description: Change the chart type: Bars, Candles, Line, Area, Renko, Kagi, PointAndFigure, LineBreak, HeikinAshi, HollowCandles

tools.name: chart_manage_indicator
tools.description: Add or remove an indicator. action=add requires name; action=remove requires entity_id

allow_remove_any.description: For add only: if TradingView reports a study limit, explicitly allow removing the most recent existing study, logging it to research, and retrying once

inputs.description: Optional input values array for add

name.description: Indicator name for add (e.g. RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands)

tools.name: chart_set_visible_range
tools.description: Zoom the chart to show bars between from and to timestamps (Unix seconds)

tools.name: chart_scroll_to_date
tools.description: Scroll the chart to center on a specific date/timestamp (Unix seconds)

tools.name: symbol_info
tools.description: Get extended info for the current chart symbol: full name, exchange, type, description

tools.name: symbol_search
tools.description: Search TradingView symbols by name or description. Returns up to 15 matches.

exchange.description: Filter by exchange, e.g. NASDAQ, NYSE (optional)

type.description: Filter by type: stock, forex, crypto, futures, index (optional)

tools.name: data_get_ohlcv
tools.description: Get OHLCV bar data from the chart. Use summary=true for compact stats instead of all bars (saves context).

count.description: Number of bars to retrieve (max 500, default 100)

summary.description: Return summary stats instead of all bars — much smaller output

tools.name: quote_get
tools.description: Get real-time quote data for a symbol (price, OHLC, volume)

symbol.description: Symbol to quote (blank = current chart symbol)

tools.name: data_get_study_values
tools.description: Get current numeric values from all visible indicators (RSI, MACD, BB, EMA, etc.)

tools.name: data_get_pine_lines
tools.description: Read horizontal price levels drawn by Pine Script indicators (line.new). Returns deduplicated price levels per study.

study_filter.description: Substring to match study name. Omit for all.

verbose.description: Return raw line data with IDs, coordinates, colors

tools.name: data_get_pine_labels
tools.description: Read text labels drawn by Pine Script indicators (label.new). Returns text and price pairs.

study_filter.description: Substring to match study name. Omit for all.

verbose.description: Return raw label data with IDs, colors, positions

tools.name: data_get_pine_tables
tools.description: Read table data drawn by Pine Script indicators (table.new). Returns formatted text rows per table.

study_filter.description: Substring to match study name. Omit for all.

tools.name: data_get_pine_boxes
tools.description: Read box/zone boundaries drawn by Pine Script indicators (box.new). Returns deduplicated {high, low} price zones.

study_filter.description: Substring to match study name. Omit for all.

verbose.description: Return all boxes with IDs and coordinates

tools.name: data_get_indicator
tools.description: Get real indicator/study values from the TradingView study model by entity ID or name

name.description: Study name or plot title substring to match when entity_id is omitted

tools.name: data_get_indicator_history
tools.description: Get historical indicator/study values from the TradingView study model for loaded chart bars

max_bars.description: Maximum loaded chart bars to return (default 500, max 500)

name.description: Study name or plot title substring to match when entity_id is omitted

tools.name: data_get_strategy_results
tools.description: Get strategy performance metrics from Strategy Tester

tools.name: data_get_trades
tools.description: Get trade list from Strategy Tester

tools.name: data_get_orders
tools.description: Get filled order list from Strategy Tester

tools.name: data_get_equity
tools.description: Get equity curve data from Strategy Tester

tools.name: depth_get
tools.description: Get order book / DOM (Depth of Market) data from the chart

tools.name: capture_screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot of TradingView. region: "full" (default), "chart", or "strategy_tester". Saves to screenshots/ and returns the file path.

tools.name: indicator_set_inputs
tools.description: Override input values of an existing indicator. Use chart_get_state to get entity IDs and input IDs.

inputs.description: Map of input ID to new value

tools.name: indicator_toggle_visibility
tools.description: Show or hide an indicator on the chart without removing it.

visible.description: true to show, false to hide

tools.name: pine_get_source
tools.description: Get current Pine Script source code from the editor. WARNING: can be very large for complex scripts.

tools.name: pine_set_source
tools.description: Backup current Pine source, then inject Pine Script source code into the editor

expected_current_sha256.description: Optional SHA256 guard for the current editor source before overwrite

source.description: Pine Script source code to inject

tools.name: pine_restore_source
tools.description: Restore Pine source from a backup manifest or .pine file and verify SHA256

backup_path.description: Path to backup.json or .pine backup file

expected_sha256.description: Required for .pine files; optional override for backup manifests

tools.name: pine_compile
tools.description: Compile / add the current Pine Script to the chart (clicks Add to chart button or Ctrl+Enter)

tools.name: pine_smart_compile
tools.description: Intelligent compile: detects button, compiles, checks errors, reports whether a new study was added

tools.name: pine_get_errors
tools.description: Get Pine Script compilation errors from Monaco editor markers

tools.name: pine_get_console
tools.description: Read Pine Script console/log output (compile messages, log.info(), errors)

tools.name: pine_save
tools.description: Save the current Pine Script to TradingView cloud (Ctrl+S)

tools.name: pine_new
tools.description: Create a new blank Pine Script of the specified type

tools.name: pine_open
tools.description: Open a saved Pine Script by name (case-insensitive, partial match supported)

tools.name: pine_list_scripts
tools.description: List all saved Pine Scripts from TradingView cloud

tools.name: pine_analyze
tools.description: Run static analysis on Pine Script code WITHOUT compiling — catches array out-of-bounds, unguarded array.first()/last(), and strategy misuse. Works offline, no TradingView connection needed.

source.description: Pine Script source code to analyze

tools.name: pine_check
tools.description: Compile Pine Script via TradingView's server API without needing the chart open. Returns compile errors/warnings.

source.description: Pine Script source code to compile/validate

tools.name: draw_shape
tools.description: Draw a shape on the chart. shape: horizontal_line, trend_line, rectangle, text, arrow_up, arrow_down, flag, circle, triangle, etc.

point2.description: Second point for multi-point shapes like trend_line or rectangle

shape.description: Shape type name (e.g. horizontal_line, trend_line, rectangle, text)

tools.name: draw_list
tools.description: List all drawing shapes currently on the chart with their entity IDs and names

tools.name: draw_get_properties
tools.description: Get all properties of a drawing shape by entity ID: points, style overrides, visibility, lock state

tools.name: draw_remove_one
tools.description: Remove a single drawing shape by entity ID

tools.name: draw_clear
tools.description: Remove all drawing shapes from the chart

tools.name: alert_create
tools.description: Create a price alert via the TradingView alert dialog

tools.name: alert_list
tools.description: List all active price alerts from TradingView

tools.name: alert_delete
tools.description: Delete alerts. Pass delete_all: true to open context menu for bulk deletion (requires confirmation).

delete_all.description: Set true to delete all alerts via context menu

tools.name: watchlist_get
tools.description: Get all symbols from the current TradingView watchlist with last price, change, and change%

tools.name: watchlist_add
tools.description: Add a symbol to the TradingView watchlist

symbol.description: Symbol to add (e.g. AAPL, BTCUSD, ES1!, NYMEX:CL1!)

tools.name: pane_list
tools.description: List all chart panes in the current layout with symbol, resolution, and active state

tools.name: pane_set_layout
tools.description: Change the chart grid layout. Codes: s (single), 2h, 2v, 2-1, 1-2, 3h, 3v, 3s, 4 (2x2), 4h, 4v, 4s, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16

layout.description: Layout code (e.g. s, 2h, 4) or alias (single, 2x2, quad)

tools.name: pane_focus
tools.description: Focus a specific chart pane by index (0-based, from pane_list)

tools.name: pane_set_symbol
tools.description: Set the symbol on a specific chart pane by index

symbol.description: Symbol to set (e.g. NQ1!, ES1!, AAPL)

tools.name: tab_list
tools.description: List all open TradingView chart tabs with their IDs and titles

tools.name: tab_new
tools.description: Open a new TradingView chart tab (sends Ctrl+T to the active window)

tools.name: tab_close
tools.description: Close the currently active chart tab. Refuses if only one tab remains.

tools.name: tab_switch
tools.description: Switch to a specific chart tab by its CDP target ID (from tab_list)

tab_id.description: CDP target ID of the tab to activate

tools.name: replay_start
tools.description: Start bar replay mode, optionally at a specific date

date.description: Date to start replay from (YYYY-MM-DD format). If omitted, selects first available date.

tools.name: replay_step
tools.description: Advance one bar in replay mode

tools.name: replay_stop
tools.description: Stop replay and return to realtime

tools.name: replay_status
tools.description: Get current replay mode status including position and P&L

tools.name: replay_autoplay
tools.description: Toggle autoplay in replay mode, optionally set speed

speed.description: Autoplay delay in ms (lower = faster). Valid values: 100, 143, 200, 300, 1000, 2000, 3000, 5000, 10000. Leave empty to just toggle.

tools.name: replay_trade
tools.description: Execute a trade action in replay mode (buy, sell, or close position)

action.description: Trade action: buy, sell, or close

tools.name: ui_click
tools.description: Click a UI element by aria-label, data-name, text content, or class substring

by.description: Selector strategy: aria-label, data-name, text, class-contains

value.description: Value to match against the chosen selector strategy

tools.name: ui_open_panel
tools.description: Open, close, or toggle TradingView panels (pine-editor, strategy-tester, watchlist, alerts, trading)

panel.description: Panel name: pine-editor, strategy-tester, watchlist, alerts, trading

tools.name: ui_fullscreen
tools.description: Toggle TradingView fullscreen mode

tools.name: layout_list
tools.description: List saved chart layouts

tools.name: layout_switch
tools.description: Switch to a saved chart layout by name or ID

name.description: Name or ID of the layout to switch to

tools.name: ui_keyboard
tools.description: Press keyboard keys or shortcuts (e.g., Enter, Escape, Alt+S, Ctrl+Z)

key.description: Key to press (e.g., Enter, Escape, Tab, a, ArrowUp)

modifiers.description: Modifier keys to hold: ctrl, alt, shift, meta

tools.name: ui_type_text
tools.description: Type text into the currently focused input/textarea element

text.description: Text to type into the focused element

tools.name: ui_hover
tools.description: Hover over a UI element by aria-label, data-name, or text content

by.description: Selector strategy: aria-label, data-name, text, class-contains

tools.name: ui_scroll
tools.description: Scroll the chart or page up/down/left/right

direction.description: Scroll direction: up, down, left, right

tools.name: ui_mouse_click
tools.description: Click at specific x,y coordinates on the TradingView window

button.description: Mouse button: left, right, middle (default left)

tools.name: ui_find_element
tools.description: Find UI elements by text, aria-label, or CSS selector and return their positions

query.description: Text content, aria-label value, or CSS selector to search for

strategy.description: Search strategy: text, aria-label, css (default: text)

tools.name: ui_evaluate
tools.description: Execute JavaScript code in the TradingView page context for advanced automation

expression.description: JavaScript expression to evaluate in the page context. Wrap in IIFE for complex logic.

tools.name: batch_run
tools.description: Run an action across multiple symbols and/or timeframes

action.description: Action to run: screenshot, get_ohlcv, get_strategy_results

ohlcv_count.description: Bar count for get_ohlcv action (default 100, max 500)

tools.name: chart_context_for_llm
tools.description: Aggregate chart state + current price + top-N indicator values into one structured object with a pre-built context_text string for LLM prompt injection

top_n.description: Max number of indicators to include (default: 5)

tools.name: indicator_state
tools.description: Get current value + signal direction (bullish/bearish/overbought/oversold/neutral) for a named indicator by partial name match; reduces LLM need to interpret raw value arrays

name.description: Indicator name (partial, case-insensitive match against active studies)

tools.name: market_summary
tools.description: One-call full market context: symbol, timeframe, last bar OHLCV, change%, volume vs 20-bar average, and all active indicator values

tools.name: continuous_contract_context
tools.description: For futures: detect continuous contract (NG1!, ES1!, CL2!, etc.), parse base symbol and roll number, return exchange and description from TradingView symbolExt()
